The '''Coruscant Planetary Defense Force (PDF)''' was a part of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|Defense Force]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. It was charged with the duty of defending [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]; a task which included manning the [[Orbital Defense Headquarters|orbital defense platforms]] above the planet and setting up ground defenses.

[[Carlist Rieekan/Legends|Carlist Rieekan]] was called out of retirement in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]] to command the defense force. During the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]] the PDF was wiped out along with many of its counterparts in the [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Security Force]].

==Appearances==
